channel.title: LLM Observability on Jamie's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in LLM Observability on Jamie's Blog

item.title: Observability & Trace Collection: Spring Boot & OpenTelemetry Engineering Reference
item.description:
Observability & Trace Collection — Engineering Reference

Audience: Staff engineers and senior contributors who need to understand the exact implementation mechanics, call chains, and design rationale — not the “what” but the “how” and “why”.

[!NOTE]

Executive TL;DR

This system implements LLM observability and trace collection using a pure OpenTelemetry (OTel) bridge integrated with Spring Boot 4.1 and the Micrometer Observation API, bypassing the Langfuse SDK entirely. Key architecture highlights:
